title: thelypteris novoguineensis
intro: Thelypteris novoguineensis, also known as the New Guinea fern, is a species of plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a type of fern that is native to the tropical regions of New Guinea and has been traditionally used in medicine for its various properties. The plant has been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties. The New Guinea fern can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems.
